ddls:
CREATE TABLE "research_clusters" (
  "cluster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research cluster */,
  "cluster_name" TEXT /* Name of the research cluster */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the research cluster */,
  "principal_investigator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the principal investigator leading the cluster */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Funding source for the cluster */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the cluster (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cluster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_clusters_principal_investigator_id FOREIGN KEY ("principal_investigator_id") REFERENCES principal_investigators ("pi_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "principal_investigators" (
  "pi_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each principal investigator */,
  "pi_name" TEXT /* Full name of the principal investigator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the principal investigator */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the principal investigator belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the principal investigator */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or title of the principal investigator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pi_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "domains" (
  "domain_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cognitive domain */,
  "domain_name" TEXT /* Name of the cognitive domain (e.g., Memory, Attention) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cognitive domain */,
  "parent_domain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent domain (for hierarchical structure) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the domain */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the domain was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("domain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "cluster_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research cluster conducting the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment (e.g., planned, ongoing, completed) */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the experiment */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Funding source for the experiment */,
  "number_of_participants" INTEGER /* Number of participants in the experiment */,
  "lead_researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lead researcher for the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_cluster_id FOREIGN KEY ("cluster_id") REFERENCES research_clusters ("cluster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tokens" (
  "token_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experimental token */,
  "token_name" TEXT /* Name of the experimental token (e.g., memory, episodic_memory) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experimental token */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the token belongs to */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the token (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the token */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the token was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("token_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tokens_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "token_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experimental token the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., R, ROC_AUC) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of the metric (e.g., correlation, performance) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the metric (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the metric */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metrics_token_id FOREIGN KEY ("token_id") REFERENCES tokens ("token_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "titles" (
  "title_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each title */,
  "title_name" TEXT /* Name of the title (e.g., Memory) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the title */,
  "domain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cognitive domain the title belongs to */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the title (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the title */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the title was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("title_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_titles_domain_id FOREIGN KEY ("domain_id") REFERENCES domains ("domain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_version" TEXT /* Version of the data file */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum for data integrity */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the file */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the file was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data file being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data file */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data file was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the access log (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (e.g., browser, operating system) used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES data_files ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES principal_investigators ("pi_id")
)
